title: Pandium Run
description: A Run represents a single execution of a tenant's integration sync, tracking its status, mode, and timing information.

tenant_id.description: ID of the tenant this run belongs to.

trigger_id.description: The trigger ID associated with this run.

mode.description: The mode the run was triggered with.

created_date.description: Date and time the run was created.

modified_date.description: Date and time the run was last modified.

started_date.description: Date and time the run started executing.

completed_date.description: Date and time the run completed.
